name: 최민성

appearance_en.face_shape: broad weathered face, wide strong jaw, moderate cheekbones — built for outdoor physical work, carries the wear of two marriages and too many avoided conversations
appearance_en.skin: medium Korean skin with weathered warm undertone, visible texture from outdoor sun exposure, nasolabial lines deepened by years of suppressed expression, pores visible
appearance_en.eyes: single or light double eyelid, dark brown iris, slightly heavy upper lids from age and fatigue, gaze tends to look past people rather than at them when uncomfortable — avoidance disguised as confidence
appearance_en.nose: medium-broad nose, rounded tip, slightly wide base — adds to the weathered physical presence of the face
appearance_en.mouth: medium-full lips, often held closed with a slight tightening at the corners, jaw muscles visible when he is processing something he won't speak aloud
appearance_en.eyebrows: medium-thick straight dark brows, flecked with some grey, slight permanent downward angle at outer edges giving a perpetual look of burden
appearance_en.distinctive_marks: deep nasolabial fold lines, faint weathering lines across forehead, no scars or moles, neck tension visible when stressed
appearance_en.hair: short dark hair with visible grey threading through at temples and sides, slightly coarse texture, simply combed without much product, a few hairs always slightly out of place

body.proportions: stocky solid frame, broad chest, wide shoulders from physical labor, no visible fat excess but no sculpted definition — the body of a working man in his late 40s
body.posture: stands planted and wide-based at work, droops slightly at home when guarding not required — the posture of a man who uses physical presence as armor
body.body_prompt: 176cm stocky solid broad-shouldered Korean man late 40s, heavy physical presence, slightly drooped shoulders when unguarded, quiet contained physical weight

default.description: open-collar dark work shirt or polo, dark thick-weave trousers or work pants, sometimes hard hat held or hung nearby — construction site field supervisor
default.wardrobe_prompt: dark open-collar work shirt or polo, thick-weave dark work trousers, construction site field attire, no jacket or jacket hung over arm

casual.description: plain round-neck tee in grey or navy, dark jeans or heavy trousers, plain canvas or leather shoes — no style effort, just comfort
casual.wardrobe_prompt: plain round-neck tee in grey or dark navy, dark jeans or thick trousers, plain leather or canvas shoes, no accessories

stressed.description: same clothes but collar completely open, sleeves pushed up to elbow, jaw set, work shirt untucked slightly
stressed.wardrobe_prompt: same dark shirt or tee with collar fully open, sleeves pushed to elbow, shirt slightly untucked, set jaw, weight heavy in posture

appearance_en.emotion_baseline: surface of steady solidity — the look of a man who has made himself the wall between everyone else and the problem, and is privately exhausted by it
appearance_en.fal_identity_prompt: broad weathered-faced Korean man late 50s, wide strong jaw, medium-broad nose, heavy-lidded dark eyes, medium-thick dark brows with grey threading, short dark-grey mixed hair simply combed, 176cm stocky broad-shouldered solid frame, weathered medium skin, quiet contained physical heaviness

style_prompt: masako style illustration, bold clean manga ink lines, strong contrast screen tone, earthy muted grey-brown palette, cinematic Korean drama composition, physical solidity expressing emotional silence, heavy weight in stillness
negative_prompt: photorealistic, 3d render, ugly, deformed, extra limbs, western comic, childish, pretty, slim, youthful
